alerts.title: US 287 Intersection Improvements-139889
alerts.description:
Between County Road 72 and CO 14 (7 to 8 miles north of the Laporte area) from Mile Point 363 to Mile Point 362. Road construction. Alternating traffic. Starting July 22, 2026 at 6:30AM MDT until July 22, 2026 at about 7:00PM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 22, 6:30AM - July 22, 7:00PM Comment: MP 362-363 SB lane closure M-F 7/20-7/24 6:30am-7pm with flagging and alternating traffic queues. Expect Delays. alerts.title: US 287 Intersection Improvements-137535
alerts.description:
Between Red Feather Lakes Road and CO 14 (8 to 9 miles north of the Laporte area) from Mile Point 364 to Mile Point 363. Right shoulder closed due to road construction. Starting July 22, 2026 at 7:00AM MDT until July 22, 2026 at about 7:00PM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 22, 7:00AM - July 22, 7:00PM Comment: Bonner Springs Ranch Rd Site - Shoulder Closure West side of road 24/7, all week long, MP 363-364.
